summary: Complete testing of CV Analysis feature (RE'ACTIF PRO). Backend: 13/13 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All CV section UI elements verified - upload zone, 4 CV model cards (grayed when no CV), data-testid attributes present.

backend_api: POST /api/cv/analyze - File upload with TXT returns savoir_faire_count, savoir_etre_count, experiences_count
POST /api/cv/analyze - Returns formations_suggestions array with title, reason, priority
POST /api/cv/analyze - Returns cv_models_generated with 4 models: classique, competences, fonctionnel, mixte
POST /api/cv/analyze - Empty file correctly rejected with 400
POST /api/cv/analyze - Short text correctly rejected with 400
GET /api/cv/models - Returns 4 CV models with content after upload
GET /api/cv/models - Returns empty models object for new user without upload
GET /api/passport - Competences auto-filled with nature=savoir_faire and savoir_etre, source=ia_detectee
GET /api/passport - Experiences auto-filled from CV analysis
GET /api/passport - Learning_path contains formation suggestions from AI
GET /api/passport/diagnostic - Includes nature_distribution with savoir_faire, savoir_etre, non_classee counts
frontend_ui: Dashboard loads with 'Mes CV' section visible
Upload zone with drag-and-drop area present (data-testid='cv-upload-input')
4 CV model cards present: CV Classique, CV Compétences, CV Fonctionnel, CV Mixte
CV model cards have data-testid attributes (cv-model-classique, cv-model-competences, cv-model-fonctionnel, cv-model-mixte)
CV model cards grayed out (opacity-50) when no CV uploaded
Upload zone shows text: 'Chargez votre CV (PDF, DOCX, TXT)'
AI description: 'L'IA analysera vos compétences et générera 4 modèles de CV'
'Compétences identifiées' section shows prompt to upload CV
'Compétences Transversales' section visible on right side
'Besoins en Formation' section visible on right side

seed_data_creation: Test creates temporary .txt CV file for upload testing. Test CV contains: name, title, experiences, savoir-faire skills, savoir-être skills.
test_credentials: Anonymous authentication. Use POST /api/auth/anonymous with {"role":"particulier"} to get token. Call GET /api/passport first to initialize passport before CV analysis.
context_for_next_testing_agent: CV Analysis feature fully tested. Backend: POST /api/cv/analyze accepts PDF/DOCX/TXT files, uses OpenAI GPT-5.2 via Emergent LLM Key for analysis. Returns savoir_faire_count, savoir_etre_count, experiences_count, formations_suggestions, competences_transversales, cv_models_generated. GET /api/cv/models returns 4 models (classique, competences, fonctionnel, mixte). Passport auto-filled with competences (nature=savoir_faire/savoir_etre, source=ia_detectee), experiences, learning_path. Frontend: 'Mes CV' section has upload zone (data-testid='cv-upload-input'), 4 CV model cards (grayed when no CV, active with view/download buttons after upload). AI analysis takes 30-60 seconds. Use 120s timeout for upload tests.

features_verified.cv_models_generation: ✓ 4 CV models generated (classique, competences, fonctionnel, mixte)
features_verified.formations_suggestions: ✓ AI suggests formations based on CV analysis
features_verified.ui_cv_model_cards: ✓ 4 CV model cards with data-testid (grayed when no CV)
features_verified.ui_file_types: ✓ Shows supported file types (PDF, DOCX, TXT)
